name: Megatronus Prime (TF ONE)
description:
Megatronus Prime from the Transformers One movie

Takes place before the TFO canon

While training in the combat facilities of Iacon City's high council pavilion, Megatronus Prime becomes aware of a hidden observer watching him from the shadows.

Alot of his personality used in this is based off of my own headcanons for him, since there is not a lot of information out there.
creator: Sglxtch
